calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. JUdge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner Julie R. Collingwood was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Julie Rebecca Flynn. Decree signed in open court.
